## Constitution Compliance

- [ ] CHK001 Code Quality Excellence: Code passes linting, follows style guidelines, uses meaningful names
- [ ] CHK002 Code Quality Excellence: Complex logic documented, duplication eliminated, complexity justified
- [ ] CHK003 Testing Standards: Unit test coverage minimum 80% of critical paths
- [ ] CHK004 Testing Standards: All tests pass in CI/CD, integration tests validate contracts
- [ ] CHK005 Testing Standards: Tests independent and repeatable, run under 5 seconds for unit suite
- [ ] CHK006 User Experience Consistency: UI/UX patterns consistent with design guidelines (if applicable)
- [ ] CHK007 User Experience Consistency: Error messages clear and actionable
- [ ] CHK008 User Experience Consistency: Accessibility standards met (WCAG 2.1 AA minimum if UI)
- [ ] CHK009 Performance Requirements: API endpoints respond within 200ms (p95) for standard queries
- [ ] CHK010 Performance Requirements: Performance regression tests pass, benchmarks documented

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK011 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK012 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK013 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK014 Another category item
- [ ] CHK015 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK016 Final item in this category

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
